meaning: n.(两边有树的)小谷,小溪谷,幽谷 美国德尔公司,美国最大电脑厂商之一
examples: Many people would look back on Dell and say, "You went straight up."
You have not communicated with me as a senior management team member on my career development plan in Dell.
What was the process inside Dell that percolated that up as something that was a major strategic initiative for the company?
A. who, like Rollins, was a partner at Bain until joining Dell two years ago.
Dell is adjusting: 38% of its unit output is notebooks, up from 21% in 2000.
